excerpt: [Legion Agents Index]|root: {AGENTS_DIR} (resolve via workflow-common-core Agent Path Resolution)
issue: Dynamic Knowledge Index tells readers to Read exact agent files, but the root uses the placeholder {AGENTS_DIR} with only a parenthetical resolution note. Under 4.7 literalism a reader may treat {AGENTS_DIR} as a literal path, or fail silently when workflow-common-core isn't loaded.
remediation_sketch: State the resolution rule inline and the fallback path. If resolution yields no concrete path, emit an escalation of type scope rather than guessing the agent directory.

excerpt: Marketing workflows activate when /legion:plan detects a marketing-focused phase (MKT-* requirements or marketing keywords). ... Design workflows activate when /legion:plan detects a design-focused phase (DSN-* requirements or design keywords).
issue: 'marketing keywords' and 'design keywords' are unenumerated triggers. Under 4.7 literalism, readers reproducing this decision may over-match on any surface keyword or miss synonyms not in a canonical list.
remediation_sketch: Drop 'or keywords' and restrict trigger to the MKT-*/DSN-* prefix, or cross-reference .planning/config/intent-teams.yaml as the authoritative trigger list.
